eyebrow: Answer today without guessing what done means
headline: Send the pending request; draft its confirmation line.
subheadline: Paste the request waiting in your inbox. I'll restate the expected behavior and boundary, then draft a confirmation line you can send today.
chatStarter: Rustam, this request is holding up work, and I need a precise reply I can send today without accepting the wrong scope.
proofLine: Start with a free 15-minute fit check.
whyItWorks: A pending request gains a sendable response while its meaning is still blocking work.

eyebrow: A calm boundary both sides can inspect
headline: Translate the request into confirmable acceptance wording.
subheadline: Share the original wording and surrounding constraint. Together we'll express actor, expected behavior, and boundary in language the requester can confirm or correct.
chatStarter: Rustam, I want to confirm what this request means without sounding defensive or committing beyond what was asked.
whyItWorks: Confirmable wording replaces interpretation drift with a professional, correctable statement of scope.

eyebrow: Check the claims capable of changing what you do
headline: Paste the AI answer; flag action-changing claims.
subheadline: Send the answer with its source material. I'll mark which claims drive action, separate evidence from inference, and flag what needs verification now.
chatStarter: Rustam, I am about to use this AI answer, but a wrong claim would change what I tell the team today.
whyItWorks: Immediate stakes focus verification on claims capable of changing today's action.

eyebrow: Keep useful output and visible uncertainty together
headline: Map evidence, inference, and gaps in AI output.
subheadline: Share the output and available sources. I'll return a compact evidence map showing supported statements, reasonable inference, and unresolved claims without discarding useful work.
chatStarter: Rustam, this AI output may be useful, and I want a disciplined view of what it actually establishes.
whyItWorks: An evidence map preserves useful output while making uncertainty visible and professionally manageable.
